action.reasoning: Observation: PyG and dependencies were uninstalled in prior iter (network disabled so reinstall impossible), causing total breakage. Analysis: N=207 is tiny so dense adj matmul is efficient and avoids all PyG issues; pre-normalize adj with self-loops once (standard D^{-1/2}AD^{-1/2}); update model to pure torch GCN-style layers, keep normalization/dataset/predict logic but ensure device/adj handling is clean. This gets a working spatiotemporal baseline (spatial GCN on temporal features). Decision: Rewrite model.py + minor fixes to train.py/predict.py (no PyG imports, use normalized adj), run training (5 epochs for quick baseline), then submit_eval on best.pt to obtain first mae_60min and measure full iter time.
